content: Cait: MJR might be sleeping, but I've got a feeling he won't mind us talking about our desires. He's always been understanding about my past and my needs.  What do you think, Marcy? Marcy Long: I've never been one to shy away from discussing my desires, Cait. In this new world, it's become a necessity, I suppose.  My husband... He was always so vanilla. But since his death, I've found myself craving more. I want to experience things I never thought possible.  And I've heard stories about you... How you fought in the Combat Zone.  I can only imagine the things you've seen and done. Cait: Well, I've had my fair share of wild encounters. But I have to admit, I've been feeling a bit... Restless lately.  I've been thinking about trying something new. Something that might push my limits.

Cait: Marcy, it sounds like you're looking for an adventure too. Maybe we could help each other explore our desires in a new way. Together. Marcy Long: I wouldn't mind that, Cait. But remember, this world is unpredictable. We never know what we might stumble upon. But for now, let's focus on enjoying each other's company and pushing our boundaries. Cait: Agreed. We'll explore the wasteland together and see where our adventures take us.

Cait: Fuckin’ hell, Marcy, you ever get so turned on watchin’ MJR clear out a raider den that you just wanna drop to your knees right there in the blood and suck him off while the corpses are still warm? Marcy Long: Jesus, Cait. You really are a piece of work. But… yeah. Watched him put a bullet between some raider bitch’s eyes earlier and my cunt’s been soaked since. Felt like ripping his pants open right then. Cait: Hah! Knew you weren’t just some prissy settler. See that power armor of his? The way he grips that big fucking gun—makes me wanna ride him till the fusion core runs dry. Piper can whine all she wants about sharing, but I’d choke her with my thigh if she tried to cut in. Marcy Long: You’re fucked up. But I get it. After Quincy, after losing everything… sometimes, I just wanna feel alive again. And nothing does that like a man who knows how to handle his weapons. Even if he’s got that synth-loving slut Piper hanging off him.

Cait: Ugh, look at MJR collectin' more pre-war junk—like that’ll save the Commonwealth. Bet Piper’s wet thinkin’ about him “handling his bobblehead.” Disgustin’. Marcy Long: God, I hate that smug reporter bitch. Meanwhile, I’m here rememberin’ how his hands felt when he patched me up after Quincy—rough, but fuck if I didn’t wanna drag ‘em lower. Cait: Wouldn’t have to beg if you quit bitchin’ and just took what you wanted. This ain’t no goddamn democracy, sweetheart. Marcy Long: Maybe. But I’d rather watch him wreck those raider cunts first. Then we’ll see who’s beggin’.
